---
title: "DSE3101 Project"
author: "LYC"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
runtime: shiny
---


```{r}
library(shiny)
library(plotly)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)


# -----------------------------
# MOCK UP MODEL
# Replace this later with Backend nowcasting data 
# -----------------------------
get_nowcast_data <- function(year, quarter, model) {
  q_start_month <- c("Q1" = 1, "Q2" = 4, "Q3" = 7, "Q4" = 10)[quarter]
  start_date <- as.Date(sprintf("%d-%02d-01", year, q_start_month))
  
  dates <- seq.Date(from = start_date - 60, by = "week", length.out = 26)
  
  set.seed(year + match(quarter, c("Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4")))
  nowcast <- cumsum(rnorm(26, 0, 0.25)) + 2
  
  df <- tibble(
    date = dates,
    nowcast = nowcast,
    ci50_low = nowcast - 0.20,
    ci50_high = nowcast + 0.20,
    ci60_low = nowcast - 0.35,
    ci60_high = nowcast + 0.35,
    ci70_low = nowcast - 0.50,
    ci70_high = nowcast + 0.50,
    ci80_low = nowcast - 0.70,
    ci80_high = nowcast + 0.70,
    actual_gdp = nowcast + rnorm(26, 0, 0.15),
    ny_fed = nowcast + 0.25,
    atlanta_fed = nowcast - 0.20
  )
  
  return(df)
}

ui <- fluidPage(
  tags$head(
    tags$style(HTML("
      body {
        background-color: #f6f8fb;
      }
      .app-title {
        font-size: 30px;
        font-weight: 700;
        margin-bottom: 6px;
      }
      .app-subtitle {
        color: #5f6b7a;
        margin-bottom: 18px;
      }
      .control-card {
        background: white;
        border: 1px solid #e5e9f0;
        border-radius: 12px;
        padding: 16px;
        margin-bottom: 16px;
        box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
      }
      .chart-card {
        background: white;
        border: 1px solid #e5e9f0;
        border-radius: 12px;
        padding: 16px;
        box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
      }
    "))
  ),
  
  div(class = "app-title", "US GDP Nowcast"),
  div(
    class = "app-subtitle",
    "Interactive dashboard for current-quarter nowcasts, confidence intervals, and benchmark comparisons."
  ),
  
  fluidRow(
    column(
      width = 8,
      div(
        class = "chart-card",
        plotlyOutput("nowcast_plot", height = "520px")
      )
    ),
    
    column(
      width = 4,
      
      div(
        class = "control-card",
        h4("Select quarter"),
        fluidRow(
          column(
            6,
            selectInput(
              "year",
              "Year",
              choices = 2000:2026,
              selected = 2026
            )
          ),
          column(
            6,
            selectInput(
              "quarter",
              "Quarter",
              choices = c("Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4"),
              selected = "Q1"
            )
          )
        )
      ),
      
      div(
        class = "control-card",
        h4("Display options"),
        checkboxInput("show_ci", "Confidence Intervals", value = FALSE),
        checkboxInput("compare_data", "Compare Data", value = FALSE)
      ),
      
      div(
        class = "control-card",
        h4("Nowcasting model"),
        selectInput(
          "model",
          "Model",
          choices = c("Best Performing Model", "VAR", "DFM", "MIDAS", "XGBoost"),
          selected = "Best Performing Model"
        )
      ),
      
      conditionalPanel(
        condition = "input.compare_data == true",
        div(
          class = "control-card",
          h4("Comparison series"),
          checkboxGroupInput(
            "comparison_series",
            "Overlay series",
            choices = c(
              "Actual GDP" = "actual_gdp",
              "NY Fed Nowcast" = "ny_fed",
              "Atlanta Fed GDPNow" = "atlanta_fed"
            ),
            selected = c("actual_gdp")
          )
        )
      )
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  nowcast_data <- reactive({
    get_nowcast_data(
      year = as.numeric(input$year),
      quarter = input$quarter,
      model = input$model
    )
  })
  
  output$nowcast_plot <- renderPlotly({
    df <- nowcast_data()
    
    p <- plot_ly()
    
    if (isTRUE(input$show_ci)) {
      p <- p %>%
        add_ribbons(
          data = df,
          x = ~date, ymin = ~ci80_low, ymax = ~ci80_high,
          name = "80% CI",
          line = list(color = "transparent"),
          fillcolor = "rgba(70,130,180,0.10)"
        ) %>%
        add_ribbons(
          data = df,
          x = ~date, ymin = ~ci70_low, ymax = ~ci70_high,
          name = "70% CI",
          line = list(color = "transparent"),
          fillcolor = "rgba(70,130,180,0.15)"
        ) %>%
        add_ribbons(
          data = df,
          x = ~date, ymin = ~ci60_low, ymax = ~ci60_high,
          name = "60% CI",
          line = list(color = "transparent"),
          fillcolor = "rgba(70,130,180,0.22)"
        ) %>%
        add_ribbons(
          data = df,
          x = ~date, ymin = ~ci50_low, ymax = ~ci50_high,
          name = "50% CI",
          line = list(color = "transparent"),
          fillcolor = "rgba(70,130,180,0.30)"
        )
    }
    
    p <- p %>%
      add_lines(
        data = df,
        x = ~date,
        y = ~nowcast,
        name = "Our Nowcast",
        line = list(width = 3, color = "#1f4e79"),
        hovertemplate = paste(
          "<b>Date:</b> %{x}<br>",
          "<b>Nowcast:</b> %{y:.2f}%<extra></extra>"
        )
      )
    
    if (isTRUE(input$compare_data) && !is.null(input$comparison_series)) {
      if ("actual_gdp" %in% input$comparison_series) {
        p <- p %>% add_lines(
          data = df,
          x = ~date,
          y = ~actual_gdp,
          name = "Actual GDP",
          line = list(width = 2, dash = "dash", color = "#2ca02c")
        )
      }
      
      if ("ny_fed" %in% input$comparison_series) {
        p <- p %>% add_lines(
          data = df,
          x = ~date,
          y = ~ny_fed,
          name = "NY Fed Nowcast",
          line = list(width = 2, dash = "dot", color = "#ff7f0e")
        )
      }
      
      if ("atlanta_fed" %in% input$comparison_series) {
        p <- p %>% add_lines(
          data = df,
          x = ~date,
          y = ~atlanta_fed,
          name = "Atlanta Fed GDPNow",
          line = list(width = 2, dash = "dot", color = "#9467bd")
        )
      }
    }
    
    p %>%
      layout(
        title = list(text = paste("US GDP Nowcast:", input$year, input$quarter)),
        xaxis = list(title = ""),
        yaxis = list(title = "Annualised GDP Growth (%)"),
        legend = list(orientation = "h", x = 0, y = -0.15),
        hovermode = "x unified",
        plot_bgcolor = "white",
        paper_bgcolor = "white"
      )
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)


```
